basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Local Research Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 16 July 2026 on the official website aiimsrishikesh.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc Nursing, GNM Nursing with 2 years experience in 200 bedded hospital, B.Sc MLT
qualification.details: Local Research Coordinator: B.Sc Nursing or GNM Nursing with 2 years of experience in a 200-bedded hospital or B.Sc MLT. Desirable: Proficiency in computer handling and MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint; knowledge of statistical tools; experience in data collection, data analysis, data handling, and report writing; experience in sample collection; excellent written and oral communication skills.

salary_details.details: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 35,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Vacancy Details 2026
AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Local Research Coordinator: B.Sc Nursing or GNM Nursing with 2 years of experience in a 200-bedded hospital or B.Sc MLT. Desirable: Proficiency in computer handling and MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint; knowledge of statistical tools; experience in data collection, data analysis, data handling, and report writing; experience in sample collection; excellent written and oral communication skills.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Salary 2026
content_sections.text: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 35,000/- per month.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 01 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Local Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Sc Nursing or GNM Nursing with 2 years of experience in a 200-bedded hospital, or a B.Sc MLT. Desirable qualifications are also mentioned.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Local Research Coordinator post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Local Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be offered a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Local Research Coordinator job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Local Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selection process for this post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is AIIMS/Rish/Nephro/18/07/2026/272.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh).

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Local Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Local Research Coordinator.
